name: Light
tagline: Command light, radiance, and vision itself.

baseAbility.name: Glow / Lens
baseAbility.description: Standard action, medium range, touch or ranged touch attack. Glow: make a target shed light (normal, then bright on command) for 1 min/CL; can be upgraded with (light) add-ons, one per glow. Lens: standard action, apply a lens effect to a target (e.g. the starting lens grants a Perception bonus for sight-based checks). Both last while you concentrate, or 1 SP more to sustain without concentration.

talents.name: Encompassing Light (light)
talents.description: A (light) add-on: bright light makes the glowing creature function as if larger, useful for combat maneuvers and reach.

talents.name: Disorienting Patterns (light)
talents.description: A (light) add-on: turns the bright light area into difficult terrain, and can force a save or fall prone for 1 SP.

talents.name: Black Light
talents.description: Your glow can shed darkness instead of light, functioning oppositely for the purposes of interacting with the Dark sphere.

talents.name: Lingering Glow
talents.description: Bright light from your glow persists briefly after you stop concentrating on it.

talents.name: Searing Light (lens)
talents.description: New lens: deal fire damage to a target with your light instead of just illuminating it.

talents.name: Revealing Light (light)
talents.description: A (light) add-on: bright light negates invisibility and concealment bonuses within it.

talents.name: True Seeing (lens)
talents.description: New lens: grant a target the ability to see through illusions, invisibility, and polymorph for the duration.

talents.name: Camouflage (lens)
talents.description: New lens: bend light around a target to help it blend into surroundings, improving Stealth.

talents.name: Intensity Control
talents.description: Shape your glow's illuminated area more freely, extending its reach and reshaping which squares it covers.
